variant: 12,000 / 16,000 / 18,000 lb capacity two-post lifts with air-actuated lock release

installation_requirements.base_footprint: 30 in wide x 24 in, constructed from 3/4 in thick plate
installation_requirements.air_supply_note: Compressed air supply required for airlock release mechanism

features: Air-actuated mechanical lock release (airlocks) for easier operation
Twin cylinder direct drive - no chains or cables
Large 4-inch cylinders for longer seal life and lower operating pressures
Precision steel ball bearing roller carriages
All-position mechanical safety locks in both columns

optional_equipment.description: Longer custom adapters available upon request

certifications: Manufactured in compliance with ALI, ANSI, ASME, AISI, ASTM, ASA, NEC, AWG, NEMA
safety_features: Air-actuated lock release for controlled unlocking
All-position mechanical locks on both carriages
notes: This is the airlock version - differs from standard manual in lock release mechanism
Requires compressed air supply for airlock operation
Warranty: 25 years structural, 10 year mechanical, limited lifetime hydraulic cylinder
